section.title: Your data
section.description: Export your personal data or permanently delete your account.

export.title: Export data
export.description: Download all your personal data as a machine-readable JSON file (GDPR Art. 20).

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Delete account permanently?
dialog.description: This will immediately and permanently delete your account, all vehicles, logs, expenses, reminders, and your profile. There is no grace period and no undo.
dialog.confirmLabel: Type your email address to confirm
